EC-M-17: Find a Teacher with no filters must navigate to find-tutors — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.

Expected
EC-M-17: Find a Teacher with no filters must navigate to find-tutors.
Actual

Bug ID

Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing. Default country is +966 Saudi Arabia which expects ~9 digits. Test parameters: 7, min, 7, digits.

Bugs sharing a root cause are grouped here. Click any ticket ID to jump to its full bug card.
QA-02 -001 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa02 ec empty phone send code disabled
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa02_ec_empty_phone_send_code_disabled 2026-06-12 10:54:50 41.57s
What this test was checking
EC-M-01: Empty phone field — Send Code must stay disabled — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Click the 'Send Code' button
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
EC-M-01: Empty phone field — Send Code must stay disabled.
What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
Download .webm
    raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None

E   Call log:

Failed: Test qa02 ec phone too short send code disabled
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa02_ec_phone_too_short_send_code_disabled 2026-06-12 10:54:50 41.71s
What this test was checking
EC-M-03: Phone with < 7 digits — Send Code must stay disabled — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Test data used
fill("123")
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Click the 'Send Code' button
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
EC-M-03: Phone with < 7 digits — Send Code must stay disabled.
What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.

BASE_URL

  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Use the search field on the page
  3. Click the navigation link being tested
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)

Failed: Test qa02 ec mobile viewport modal renders
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa02_ec_mobile_viewport_modal_renders 2026-06-12 10:54:50 41.73s
What this test was checking
EC-M-13: Login modal must render correctly on mobile viewport (375px) — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Click the 'Log In' button in the page header
  3. Open the page on a mobile-sized viewport (≤ 414px wide)
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
EC-M-13: Login modal must render correctly on mobile viewport (375px).
What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.

QA-02 -014 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa02 ec phone boundary lengths
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa02_ec_phone_boundary_lengths 2026-06-12 10:54:50 41.71s
What this test was checking
Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing. Default country is +966 Saudi Arabia which expects ~9 digits. Other lengths may legitimately disable Send Code as a validation signal — that is correct behavior, not a bug. We verify the form remains responsive and the input was accepted; we do NOT assert Send Code becomes enabled at every length — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: 7, min, 7, digits.
Test data used
params: [7, min, 7, digits]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Use these parameters: 7, min, 7, digits
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing.
What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
Download .webm

Browser: Chromium Viewport: 1280x720 Env: Staging
QA-02 -020 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa02 ec phone boundary lengths
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa02_ec_phone_boundary_lengths 2026-06-12 10:54:50 41.48s
What this test was checking
Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing. Default country is +966 Saudi Arabia which expects ~9 digits. Other lengths may legitimately disable Send Code as a validation signal — that is correct behavior, not a bug. We verify the form remains responsive and the input was accepted; we do NOT assert Send Code becomes enabled at every length — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: 12, max, 12, digits.
Test data used
params: [12, max, 12, digits]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Use these parameters: 12, max, 12, digits
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing.
What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
Download .webm
